item.title: It's the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i am totally showing this meme to my dad
makes sense
looks suspect
i'm a fan of this for some reason
democracy is beautiful
clever
nice
mood
lemme get some of that 2017 discipline though
i can relate to this because i'm a hardened criminal
good stuff
wonder if that's photoshop or an actual goat/moth hybrid
mmm hmm
obviously
we've all done this but survived
it's a special day
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: My Twentyfifth Dump
item.description:
Today's bait image is NOT of a frog, but another pretty lady, and this time I actually know who it is, which... is a first.
You guys, I had a thought.
The closer this reverse image-posting journey gets to the present day, the less of a time machine it becomes.
And more of a "Oh yeah I remember that from a few months ago" or a "I saw that in another dump just recently.
Hopefully that doesn't make it any less entertaining though.
ANYWAY LET'S--- oh, a frog.
ANYWAY LET'S-- oh I have to send this to my DM.
ANYWAY LET'S GOOOOO!!
One for the looneybin inhabitants.
The last remnant of the Oceangate marker from the last dump.
Hey, 'member when Twitter limited the amount of tweets you could see without paying? 'member?
Oh, a good news! How did that get in here?
One for the dnd crowd.
Badum-tss!
I genuinely laughed out loud like a lunatic the first time I saw this gem.
[crimson nirnroot sound]
I'mmmmmmm not sorry.
A Ukraine war meme! 'member when they blew up that bridge?
Legend.
Another good news! Really warms your heart.
Someone else might have gotten it wrong.
... there are some really specific memes in this dump, huh. Niche. And not a lot of frogs! For shame.
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: 9/11 Photos taken by Mark Tomsheck
item.description: Photos taken on 9/11 continue to be mapped here: https://archdisk.com/911/photomap.html Source: http://tomsheck.com/thumbs395-1.htm Thanks to Mark Tomsheck for sharing these images. Keep up with the research and discoveries: https://discord.gg/911archive https://reddit.com/r/911archive
item.dc:creator: Bezniados

item.title: Squid Ink Mishap at a China Restaurant
item.description: "Is it gone?" "Nah, if it were (that easy to clean), the waitress would have cleaned hers off." Video cut to said waitress just doing her job with the inked face.

item.title: Mike Ilitch is a Detroit Legend
item.description: Not only was he the Founder of Little Caesar's, but also owner of BOTH the Detroit Tigers and Red Wings. That man had glorious hair. He passed away in 2017.

item.title: Backlogged memes (kirbaguette)
item.description: What the fork is wrong with Imgur. Why is it not letting me upload posts with commentary. I have to go back and add it in like some sort of PEASANT. I won’t do it. I have my pride. Get your shirt together, Imgur. Anyway have some memes. And if you want context too bad, Imgur said no.
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Bottom shelf shelves.
item.description:
Goddammit. I fucked up the crop. @IceWeaselX put it in the comments for ya.
Embrace the chaos
BSV here to uncensor your censored memes.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@quailow
@nosimpleway @Ilurklikekirk @Fairemont [pretend this is the 19th image of the dump because I fucked up]
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
@lefish
The POtato box tatos are growing so nicely!
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
I accidentally got blackout drunk on stream last night spending 2 hours trying to figure out how to use my goddamn controller on Minecraft Java...I spent all of today dead in bed pinned down by Taxi.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.dc:creator: TheOneYouWereWarnedAbout

item.title: Every year around US tax time, this makes its rounds
item.description: It’s not a joke, there are truly people who make this argument. I always find this very whiny. -the tax form that you likely needed to use in high school was a 1040ez. It was simple addition and subtraction. If you couldn’t figure it out, you shouldn’t have graduated -your school likely had a business class that would teach you about taxes, I know people who took it -yes, years later you might need to use other forms but it is unlikely that you would remember what they taught you about those forms -the tax laws change quite often -the laws governing parallelograms have not changed since you learned them
item.dc:creator: Fanner50
